items.title: VGT And XLK: Time To Cut Exposure To These Large ETFs

items.title: MAGY: Seek Exposure For Mag 7, But Caution Is Warranted

items.title: 'We're At This Intermediate Stage': Ex-Tesla AI Chief Andrej Karpathy Says AGI Is Still A Decade Away
items.description: Artificial general intelligence is still years away and far from the breakthroughs some tech leaders predict, former Tesla Inc. (NASDAQ:TSLA) senior director of AI and OpenAI founding member Andrej Karpathy said. "We're at this intermediate stage," he told host Dwarkesh Patel on the "Dwarkesh Podcast" in October. "The models are amazing. They still need a lot of work." Hype Meets Reality Karpathy said the rapid growth of large language models has created unrealistic expectations. "Overall, the m

items.title: S&P 500 rises as plan to end shutdown starts moving through Congress: Live updates
items.description: The S&P 500 rose on Monday after Senate lawmakers took a critical step towards a potential deal to end the historic U.S. government shutdown.
